Document:
# Insurgents
Insurgents spawn in a small shuttle every round, their goal is just to be shitters and mess around.
There are currently no real objectives, so you have the freedom to be creative! Make a shotgun factory in maints, take science hostage, smash up the bar, etc.
# Bomb collar
Insurgents are rebel D-class subjects who once had bomb collars. These collars are now disabled, but they cannot be removed. Seeing a [color=red]bomb collar[/color] is [italic]usually[/italic] definitive proof someone is an [color=red]insurgent[/color]!
# Special Rules
Insurgents have to follow special rules, from [bold]Rule S5[/bold]: - Unlike other antagonists, [bold]you still have to escalate in violence[/bold]. - Don't mass murder unless it is extremely justified or creative / funny. - Don't AHelp about being killed, it's part of this role and will happen very often.
